title: Oriental Fantasy Water Element 3D Cg Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Oriental Fantasy Water Element 3D CG Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 high-precision oriental fantasy water-element 3D CG portrait of adult oriental water-spirit fantasy woman with blue-black short wavy hair, icy blue-green glassy eyes, translucent cool-white skin, and quiet distant expression. Subject: adult oriental water-spirit fantasy woman with blue-black short wavy hair, icy blue-green glassy eyes, translucent cool-white skin, and quiet distant expression appears as a clearly adult semi-realistic anime-style 3D character with refined face modeling, cool pale skin, wet hair detail, crystal accessories, and thigh-up calm close portrait with slightly lowered gaze, wet reflective skin detail, and elegant restrained posture. Scene: rainy cold-toned oriental fantasy water shrine with mist, wet stone, floating droplets, and blue-green cinematic glow with rain veil, light mist, distant oriental fantasy architecture, water pool edges, transparent splashes, and atmospheric depth behind the subject. Composition: Thigh-and-upper-body character poster composition with elegant side-body line, visible shoulder, neck, waist, translucent sleeve layers, and controlled tasteful framing. Signature Elements: Preserved oriental fantasy water element 3d cg portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-finish 3D CG oriental fantasy beauty portrait with detailed character modeling, realistic material response, cinematic cool soft light, advanced virtual-character poster quality, and semi-realistic anime rendering. Color Palette: Cold white, ice blue, pale gray, blue-black hair tones, cyan gemstone accents, transparent water highlights, and low-saturation rain-day atmosphere. Lighting: Cool white key light, soft backlight, wet reflective highlights on hair, skin, fabric, jewelry, and water arcs, with delicate cinematic separation. Materials: Wet satin, sheer chiffon layers, crystal earrings, metallic ear cuff, high-collar jewelry, blue gemstone tassels, water droplets, transparent splashes, and water ribbons, rain droplets, translucent aquatic ornaments, and cool blue-green magical highlights around the body. Restrictions: Keep the subject clearly adult, elegant, and non-vulgar;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
